body.docName: 追加配送明细（供应商端）关联的追溯码
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/relate-trace-code/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/relate-trace-code/import 
 ## 接口描述 
对医招智付（供应商端）-采购平台-发货明细里的配送明细追加追溯码。
注：
 1. 是**追加**追溯码，并非覆盖；
 2. 单次导入追溯码**上限2000条**；
 3. 导入重复的追溯码时，会去重处理；
 4. 如需覆盖追溯码，请使用 “医招智付供应商端配送明细导入”api。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospitalXftCode","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E7%9A%84%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","desc":"","exampleValue":"%22XFT00001%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributionCode","required":true,"maxLength":"64","label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S2026012901%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","required":true,"name":"traceCodes","maxLength":"2000","label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%5B%2211111111111111111111111111%22%5D","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA2000%E6%9D%A1%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%9D%A1%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA100%E3%80%82"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Etrue%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Efalse","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"associationQuantity","required":true,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%B7%B2%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"2000","desc":"%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%B7%B2%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%810%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%9A%0A%0A1.%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A52000%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E2000%EF%BC%9B%0A2.%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%BA%8C%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A52000%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E4000%EF%BC%9B%0A3.%20%E4%BE%9D%E6%AD%A4%E7%B1%BB%E6%8E%A8..."}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "hospitalXftCode": "XFT00001",
    "distributionCode": "S2026012901",
    "traceCodes": [
        "12345678901234567890",
        "111111111111111111111111111111"
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "associationQuantity": 2
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
<richtable>{"uuid":"5ce4cc51-20e2-48d2-8471-0bb63db9d118","columns":[{"title":"错误码","dataIndex":"0","resizable":true,"width":108},{"title":"错误信息","dataIndex":"1","resizable":true,"width":114},{"title":"解决方案","dataIndex":"2","resizable":false,"width":117}],"dataSource":[{"0":"EROOR1","1":"系统错误","2":"稍后再试，或联系开发人员"},{"0":"EROOR2","1":"配送明细不存在","2":"输入正确的配送明细编码"},{"0":"EROOR2","1":"配送明细已推送，无法追加追溯码","2":"已推送至医院的明细，无法追加追溯码，请核验配送明细编码是否正确"},{"0":"E0002","1":"导入的配送明细唯一编码不能为空","2":"输入配送明细唯一编码"},{"0":"E0002","1":"关联的追溯码不能超过2000条","2":"分批导入追溯码，控制每批小于或等于2000"},{"0":"E0002","1":"医院薪福通企业号不存在","2":"输入正确的医院薪福通企业号"}]}</richtable>

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/relate-trace-code/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/relate-trace-code/import

接口描述

对医招智付（供应商端）-采购平台-发货明细里的配送明细追加追溯码。 注：

  1. 是追加追溯码，并非覆盖；
  2. 单次导入追溯码上限2000条；
  3. 导入重复的追溯码时，会去重处理；
  4. 如需覆盖追溯码，请使用 “医招智付供应商端配送明细导入”api。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospitalXftCode","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E7%9A%84%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","desc":"","exampleValue":"%22XFT00001%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributionCode","required":true,"maxLength":"64","label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S2026012901%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","required":true,"name":"traceCodes","maxLength":"2000","label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%5B%2211111111111111111111111111%22%5D","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA2000%E6%9D%A1%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%9D%A1%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA100%E3%80%82"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Etrue%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Efalse","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"associationQuantity","required":true,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%B7%B2%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"2000","desc":"%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E5%B7%B2%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%810%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%9A%0A%0A1.%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A52000%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E2000%EF%BC%9B%0A2.%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%BA%8C%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A52000%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E4000%EF%BC%9B%0A3.%20%E4%BE%9D%E6%AD%A4%E7%B1%BB%E6%8E%A8..."}}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "hospitalXftCode": "XFT00001",
    "distributionCode": "S2026012901",
    "traceCodes": [
        "12345678901234567890",
        "111111111111111111111111111111"
    ]
}

响应报文

{
    "body": {
        "associationQuantity": 2
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
